records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you were looking for me, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you were looking for me, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you were looking for me, Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What mission should I do this time? Extermination? Escort?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What mission should I do this time? Extermination? Escort?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What mission should I do this time? Extermination? Escort?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do I still have dreams about my comrades?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do I still have dreams about my comrades?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do I still have dreams about my comrades?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every night, without fail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every night, without fail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every night, without fail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can only see them in my dreams, and I can't wake up from it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can only see them in my dreams, and I can't wake up from it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can only see them in my dreams, and I can't wake up from it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My eyes look sunken? Haha, I appreciate your concerns.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My eyes look sunken? Haha, I appreciate your concerns.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My eyes look sunken? Haha, I appreciate your concerns.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't trying to make you feel guilty, so don't look so sorry. It's what I chose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't trying to make you feel guilty, so don't look so sorry. It's what I chose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't trying to make you feel guilty, so don't look so sorry. It's what I chose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also... I feel that sleeping is a waste of time if I want to find the real cause behind all of this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also... I feel that sleeping is a waste of time if I want to find the real cause behind all of this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also... I feel that sleeping is a waste of time if I want to find the real cause behind all of this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am doing this to find the cause, and for my comrades who were sacrificed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am doing this to find the cause, and for my comrades who were sacrificed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am doing this to find the cause, and for my comrades who were sacrificed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is still too much to be done to sulk in despair.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is still too much to be done to sulk in despair.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is still too much to be done to sulk in despair.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We must move forth, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We must move forth, Supreme Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We must move forth, Supreme Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The darkness still creeps toward the world, and someone must purify it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The darkness still creeps toward the world, and someone must purify it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The darkness still creeps toward the world, and someone must purify it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe that you are well aware of this fact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe that you are well aware of this fact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe that you are well aware of this fact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Many at this company trust and follow you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Many at this company trust and follow you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Many at this company trust and follow you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were they drawn to what you've shown them so far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were they drawn to what you've shown them so far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were they drawn to what you've shown them so far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lifetime contract is a symbol that both parties completely trust each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lifetime contract is a symbol that both parties completely trust each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lifetime contract is a symbol that both parties completely trust each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see that this is a perfect opportunity for us to move forward together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see that this is a perfect opportunity for us to move forward together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see that this is a perfect opportunity for us to move forward together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Here. I have signed it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Here. I have signed it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Here. I have signed it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From now on, I am your sun and flaming sword.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From now on, I am your sun and flaming sword.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From now on, I am your sun and flaming sword.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Command me anything, Supreme Administrator. I have complete trust in you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Command me anything, Supreme Administrator. I have complete trust in you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Command me anything, Supreme Administrator. I have complete trust in you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just hope that you don't give up until you achieve the results you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just hope that you don't give up until you achieve the results you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just hope that you don't give up until you achieve the results you want.
